functionDeclarations.name: recall_chat_attachment
functionDeclarations.description: Recall a previously uploaded image or document from this chat by reusing its Gemini Files handle or silently re-uploading it from local CAS storage when needed.

target.description: The prior attachment to recall. Prefer the exact CAS path, display name, basename, or stem from the chat attachment catalog.

reason.description: Short reason for recall, such as `ocr page 50`, `quote exactly`, or `read chart text`.
